mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_no, address, address_detail, lat, lng, default_ad) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{defaultAd})
mapper.select: SELECT address_id , address , address_detail , lat , lng , default_ad FROM address WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY default_ad DESC, address_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET default_ad = CASE WHEN address_id = #{addressId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
